title: Rename devis - Restore Defaults returns to official device name
scenario: Device name does not revert to official name after Restore Defaults in Device Settings on Poly Voyager
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the device (e.g., Voyager) to open Device Settings.
Tap on the device name field and rename it to a custom name (e.g., "My Voyager").
Navigate back to the Home screen.
Open Device Settings again for the same device.
Tap on "Restore Defaults" (or navigate to Device Settings → Restore Defaults).
Confirm the restore defaults action if prompted.
Observe the device name displayed on the Home screen and in Device Settings.
expected: After restoring defaults, the device name should revert to its official name (e.g., "Voyager").
